title: selaginella depressa
intro: Selaginella depressa, also known as the 'Rattlesnake Plant' or 'Bleeding Heart Fern', is a species of evergreen, terrestrial fern-like plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Selaginella depressa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Selaginella depressa is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal uses, although its consumption should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
